category_sources: source_facts.description says gmailctl provides declarative configuration for Gmail filters; official GitHub README describes generating and maintaining Gmail filters declaratively.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gmailctl; official GitHub README and repository use gmailctl.
docs_sources: Official mbrt/gmailctl repository README documents installation, usage, configuration, search operators, actions, labels, tests, and tips.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/mbrt/gmailctl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Gmail filter configuration; official README describes a Jsonnet configuration file for categorizing, labeling, archiving, and managing Gmail inboxes automatically.
